business.name: Harborlight Flower Studio
business.summary: A planning guide inspired by floral design studio. Service and availability details are not confirmed.

audience.primary: People seeking distinctive flowers for gifts, personal moments, and events
needs: A simple way to request flowers
Clear examples of the studio style
Guidance on custom arrangements and event florals

offerings.name: Custom arrangements
offerings.description: Seasonal floral designs created for gifts, celebrations, and personal spaces.

offerings.name: Event florals
offerings.description: Flowers for intimate gatherings, ceremonies, dinners, and other special occasions.

offerings.name: Everyday bouquets
offerings.description: Fresh bouquets designed for simple gestures and everyday beauty.

brand.voice: Gentle, clear, and personal, with vivid but restrained language.
brand.aesthetic: A quiet coastal still life style with natural textures, generous space, deep ink type, and close floral photography.

signatureMove.name: Flowers follow the light
signatureMove.description: A single botanical stem shifts subtly toward the pointer as visitors move through the opening section. All text and actions remain fixed and fully readable.
signatureMove.touchFallback: The stem appears as a static composition while every section and action remains available.
signatureMove.reducedMotion: The stem remains still with no animated transitions.

content.headline: Explore Ideas
content.subheadline: A practical starting point for considering floral design studio before confirming details with the business.
content.about: Use these notes to clarify priorities, setting, and personal preferences before confirming details.
